name: Infographic Maker
examples_zh: 把这篇行业报告整理成一张手绘风信息图
把这 5 个产品亮点做成适合分享的一页图解
把这份年度数据摘要转成卡通风知识卡片
examples_en: Turn this report into a hand-drawn infographic
Make a one-page visual summary of these 5 product highlights
Convert this annual data summary into a cartoon-style knowledge card
description_zh: 把文章、概念和数据提炼成手绘卡通信息图
description_en: Turn articles, concepts, and data into hand-drawn infographic visuals
